preamble: The transformation from an alveolar trill ([r]) to a voiceless aspirated alveolar plosive ([tʰ]) is a documented phonetic shift, primarily observed as a fortition process.
phoneticEffects: This shift involves a change in manner of articulation from a trill to a plosive, a change in voicing from voiced to voiceless, and the addition of aspiration

examples.note: Fortition of /r/ to [tʰ] in post-nasal contexts.

sources: Bennett, W. G., Diemer, M., Kerford, J., Probert, T., & Wesi, T. (2025). Setswana (South African). Journal of the International Phonetic Association.
